title: Proactive Disclosure - Travel Expenses - Proactive Disclosure - Travel Expenses - Open Government Portal
content:
## Proactive Disclosure - Travel Expenses - Proactive Disclosure - Travel Expenses
- Download CSV TSV JSON XML
This resource view is not available at the moment. Click here for more information.
Your browser does not support iframes.
T-2019-P1-00001 – this sequence will continue for each line item (i.e.: T-2019-P1-00001, T-2019-P1-00002, T-2019-P1-00003, etc.)
This field is populated by the organization. It is a unique reference number given to each line item in the spreadsheet. Having a unique identifier for each item will allow users locate a specific item in the registry should they need to modify or delete.
This field will display the group to which the individual belongs.
Minister/Ministerial adviser/Ministerial staff/Parliamentary Secretary/Exempt Staff
Senior officer or employee
This field will display the position title of the person who travelled, in English
This field will display the position title of the person who travelled, in French.
This field will display the name of the  person who travelled
A short description, in English, of the reason for the trip. The description should be succinct (one line if possible) and provide users with a general sense of the trip's purpose. Use of acronyms should be avoided.
A short description, in French, of the reason for the trip. The description should be succinct (one line if possible) and provide users with a general sense of the trip's purpose. Use of acronyms should be avoided.
Date (Please format the date as YYYY-MM-DD)
To cover the date the travel started
Date (Please format the date as YYYY-MM-DD)
To cover the date the travel ended (can be the same as travel start date)
Free text – Note, use the format , ,  for Canada and US, or ,  for international (e.g. Ottawa, Ontario, Canada or London, England)
To include name of the first place visited during the trip in question, in English.
Free text – Note, use the format , ,  for Canada and US, or ,  for international (e.g. Ottawa, Ontario, Canada or London, England)
To include name of the first place visited during the trip in question, in French.
Free text – Note, use the format , ,  for Canada and US, or ,  for international (e.g. Ottawa, Ontario, Canada or London, England)
To include name of second place visited during the trip in question, in English.
Free text – Note, use the format , ,  for Canada and US, or ,  for international (e.g. Ottawa, Ontario, Canada or London, England)
To include name of second place visited during the trip in question, in French.
Free text – Note, use the format , , ;,  (e.g. Ottawa, Ontario, Canada;London, England)
To include names of all other places visited during the trip in question, in English.
Free text – Note, use the format , , ;,  (e.g. Ottawa, Ontario, Canada;London, England)
To include names of all other places visited during the trip in question, in French.
Numerical – Note, do not include dollar signs ($), all amounts include taxes.
Total cost of any airline tickets, if applicable.
Numerical – Note, do not include dollar signs ($), all amounts include taxes.
Total cost of any other forms of transportation (for example, train, bus, vehicle rental, private vehicle, taxis, etc), if applicable.
Numerical – Note, do not include dollar signs ($), all amounts include taxes.
Total cost of accommodation
Numerical – Note, do not include dollar signs ($), all amounts include taxes.
Total cost of meals and incidentals expenses.
Numerical – Note, do not include dollar signs ($), all amounts include taxes.
Total cost of all other items that are not covered by the above fields (for example. special passport, visas, associated photos, calls to the office or home, dependant care where applicable, etc.).
Numerical – Note, do not include dollar signs ($), all amounts include taxes.
The total of the amount listed above.
This field may be populated with additional comments in English.
This field may be populated with additional comments in French.
